name: voice
description: Voice mode — STT/TTS/VAD overlay (BrowserSTT + BrowserTTS) plus the language detector used by chat-actions for auto-pick of TTS voices. The activate() is a no-op today: VoiceMode is still mounted statically by App.tsx and lang-detect is still imported by chat/chat-actions.ts. Adding register-side wiring (e.g. a chatBarLeftButtons entry to open the overlay) is a follow-up — file move first, slot integration later.
